form.formComment: Missed the frame last time but finished in the minors at big odds two back when third (17.36) over 295m at this track. With a clean start should be thereabouts.

form.formComment: Won two starts back after racing on the pace at this track over 295m in 17.21. Followed that up with a minor placing over 295m at this track at Class 1 two weeks ago. Suited here and gets chance to bounce back.

form.formComment: Didn't make the placings last time at this track (17.66) in a Class 1, finishing a 0.7 lengths fourth. Yet to score but has placed each of three runs from this draw. Hard to beat.

form.formComment: Last start finished 4th in a Class 2 on March 30 over 295m at this track behind Impressive Nora beaten 3.5 lengths (17.40). Some good form is emerging from that last run. Speedy conveyance who looks hard to beat.
